productDisplayName: Lee Men's Cosmos Blue Lapis T-shirt
description: CompositionBlue polo neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, white tipped collar with a striped inner and in-seam talking of lee, branded buttons on a chest placket, half sleeves with white ribbed hems, lee branding embroidered on left chest and a vented hemFittingComfortWash care Machine wash in cold water inside out separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Soft and comfortable, this cotton polo t-shirt from Lee speaks volumes of its founder, Henry David Lee, and makes for a great semi-formal and casual wear.
